item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Technology, Economic Development, & Veterans.
item.description: First reading, referred to Technology, Economic Development, & Veterans.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to Technology, Economic Development, & Veterans.

item.title: 👎Jeff Pack - Washington Citizens Against Unfair Taxes
item.description: Jeff Pack signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Citizens Against Unfair Taxes.

item.title: 👍Shelly Stevens - Tri County Economic Development District
item.description: Shelly Stevens signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Tri County Economic Development District.

item.title: 👍Annie McGrath - State of Washington Tourism
item.description: Annie McGrath signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent State of Washington Tourism.

item.description: Anthony Anton signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Hospitality Association.

item.title: 👍David Blandford - State of Washington Tourism
item.description: David Blandford signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent State of Washington Tourism.

item.title: 👍💵Daniel Olson - WA Brewers Guild
item.description: Daniel Olson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Brewers Guild. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Josh McDonald - Washington Wine Institute
item.description: Josh McDonald signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Wine Institute.

item.title: 👍Nick Leonti - Port of Seattle
item.description: Nick Leonti signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Port of Seattle.

item.description: Daniel Olson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Brewers Guild. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Josh McDonald signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Wine Institute.
